title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Assistant Research Fellow Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Assistant Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their BDS, BAMS, PGDM, Pharm D can apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
